creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
Uploaded ad-hoc patch.

But desirable fix should be introducing devel/wasi-* for llvm14 and later, which can sanely coexist with current ones for llvm13 and automagically chosen proper ones.

I've already noticed Bug 266319, 266340, 266341 and 266342 are proposed, but not yet tried them as (I think it is) the prerequisite devel/wasi-libc is not yet proposed for them.
